items.name_en: In Stock! Chanel Cerf New Tote
items.name_cn:
In Stock! Chanel Cerf New Tote
Chanel 2026 New Cerf Tote,
Interpreting eternal elegance with a minimalist design.
Crafted from selected fine embossed calfskin,
Adorned with the iconic double-C gold clasp, a classic that never goes out of style.
The simple and atmospheric tote shape is effortless to carry on one shoulder,
Suitable for various outfit styles.
Creates a capable aura for the workplace,
Or showcases high taste for daily outings.
This Cerf tote is the perfect choice for a Chanel girl,
Perfectly blending practicality and luxury.
Those who have sold it understand,
There are too many positive reviews.

items.name_cn:
265bag mini
The mini size makes the 25bag more exquisite! The hobo style comes with a lazy, relaxed vibe. Don't let the name 'mini' fool you, the practicality is a pleasant surprise! It easily holds keys and other daily essentials, and the side flap pocket is perfect for a transit card. The opening is super convenient. It doesn't make a 160cm petite person look short at all. Worn at the armpit, it sits right at the waistline, creating perfect proportions. Jennie looks absolutely stunning in it, retro and casual, pairing with a 🧥 makes for effortlessly chic style!
Size: 20*22*12.5cm
Model: 5631 mini Black Denim
